description: Ontario Achievement Chart-aligned rubric criteria for criterion-level scoring
usage: Used by LLM assessors to provide per-criterion scores and evidence quotes

criteria.name: Subject-specific content
criteria.description: Knowledge of content (facts, terms, definitions, concepts)

indicators.4+: Thorough and insightful knowledge of content with original connections

criteria.name: Understanding of content
criteria.description: Understanding of content (concepts, ideas, theories, relationships)

indicators.4+: Thorough and insightful understanding with sophisticated interpretation

criteria.name: Critical thinking
criteria.description: Use of critical/creative thinking processes (analysis, synthesis, evaluation)

indicators.4+: Highly effective use with original insight and sophisticated reasoning
indicators.4: Highly effective use of critical thinking processes
indicators.3: Considerable effectiveness in use of critical thinking
indicators.2: Some effectiveness in use of critical thinking
indicators.1: Limited effectiveness in use of critical thinking

criteria.name: Inquiry/research skills
criteria.description: Use of inquiry/research skills (formulating questions, gathering information)

indicators.4+: Highly effective with exceptional depth and original investigation
indicators.4: Highly effective use of inquiry skills
indicators.3: Considerable effectiveness in use of inquiry skills
indicators.2: Some effectiveness in use of inquiry skills
indicators.1: Limited effectiveness in use of inquiry skills

criteria.name: Expression and organization
criteria.description: Expression and organization of ideas and information

indicators.4+: Highly effective with compelling voice and sophisticated structure
indicators.3: Considerable effectiveness in expression and organization
indicators.2: Some effectiveness in expression and organization
indicators.1: Limited effectiveness in expression and organization

indicators.4+: Highly effective with virtually no errors and stylistic sophistication
indicators.4: Highly effective use with very few errors

criteria.name: Vocabulary and terminology
criteria.description: Use of vocabulary and terminology appropriate to subject and audience

indicators.4+: Highly effective with precise, sophisticated vocabulary choices

criteria.name: Application of knowledge
criteria.description: Application of knowledge and skills in familiar contexts

indicators.4+: Highly effective with sophisticated transfer to new contexts
indicators.4: Highly effective application of knowledge and skills

criteria.name: Making connections
criteria.description: Making connections within and between contexts (text-to-text, text-to-self, text-to-world)

indicators.4+: Highly effective with original, insightful connections

additional_criteria.name: Narrative development
additional_criteria.description: Development of events, characters, and setting into a coherent story

additional_criteria.name: Sequencing and pacing
additional_criteria.description: Clear sequencing of events with effective pacing and transitions

additional_criteria.name: Voice and detail
additional_criteria.description: Use of detail, voice, and reflection to make the writing engaging and meaningful

additional_criteria.name: Judgment and recommendation
additional_criteria.description: Clear opinion about the book and a convincing recommendation or critique

additional_criteria.name: Support from the text
additional_criteria.description: Use of specific details from the book to support judgments

additional_criteria.name: Audience awareness
additional_criteria.description: Writing anticipates what another reader would want to know before reading the book

additional_criteria.name: Thesis quality
additional_criteria.description: Clarity, arguability, and insight of thesis statement

additional_criteria.name: Textual evidence
additional_criteria.description: Quality and integration of quotations from the text

additional_criteria.name: Literary analysis depth
additional_criteria.description: Analysis of literary elements (theme, character, symbolism, author's craft)

additional_criteria.name: Claim strength
additional_criteria.description: Clarity and arguability of central claim

additional_criteria.name: Evidence quality
additional_criteria.description: Relevance, credibility, and variety of supporting evidence

additional_criteria.name: Counterargument engagement
additional_criteria.description: Acknowledgment and refutation of opposing viewpoints

additional_criteria.name: Accuracy
additional_criteria.description: Factual accuracy and reliability of information

additional_criteria.name: Organization/structure
additional_criteria.description: Use of headings, sections, and logical flow

additional_criteria.name: Source integration
additional_criteria.description: Attribution and integration of sources

additional_criteria.name: Purpose clarity
additional_criteria.description: Clear statement of purpose and relevant context for the reader

additional_criteria.name: Information selection
additional_criteria.description: Selection of relevant and sufficient facts, examples, or explanations

additional_criteria.name: Tone and audience fit
additional_criteria.description: Tone, format, and explanations are appropriate for the intended recipient

additional_criteria.name: Main idea capture
additional_criteria.description: Captures the central idea and most important supporting points accurately

additional_criteria.name: Accuracy and concision
additional_criteria.description: Accurate summary with concise selection of information and minimal distortion

additional_criteria.name: Paraphrase and synthesis
additional_criteria.description: Uses the writer's own words while combining ideas into a coherent summary

additional_criteria.name: Procedural completeness
additional_criteria.description: Includes the materials, conditions, and steps needed to complete the task

additional_criteria.name: Sequence clarity
additional_criteria.description: Steps are ordered clearly so the procedure can be followed accurately

additional_criteria.name: Precision and safety
additional_criteria.description: Language is precise and includes cautions, measurements, or safety details when needed

additional_criteria.name: Audience engagement
additional_criteria.description: Language, examples, and appeals are shaped for the intended audience

additional_criteria.name: Rhetorical effectiveness
additional_criteria.description: Uses persuasive or rhetorical choices effectively to strengthen the speech

additional_criteria.name: Speech structure
additional_criteria.description: Opening, development, and closing work together as an effective speech

additional_criteria.name: Lead quality
additional_criteria.description: Lead paragraph answers who, what, when, where, why

additional_criteria.name: Objectivity
additional_criteria.description: Neutral, unbiased reporting tone

additional_criteria.name: Source attribution
additional_criteria.description: Named sources with direct quotes

evidence_requirements.quote_format: Exact text from student essay with page/line reference if available
